heading: Atlas Embedding and Reranking API
body:
Atlas bills the Embedding and Reranking API based on your usage:

- For text-based models, charges apply per token.

- For multimodal models that process images and videos, charges apply
  per pixel.

Usage charges for the Embedding and Reranking API appear in the
**Summary by Service** section of your invoice under
**AI Models**.

To learn more, see [Manage Billing for the Embedding and Reranking API](voyageai/management/billing).
